content.body:
I've been busy turning feedback from colleagues into suggested changes.  I've got as far as ACC-PWR-SBD-2 (both the requirements and assessments):

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1E5kV0wdLYQyT1I8NPGRk2UcNEh7-BmRMIk9pgJHIiZw/edit?usp=sharing
I'm attempting to get through it all before Sunday night my time, but there's still quite a bit to do and I've only got snatched hours to focus on it this weekend :/
